title: EarlyStage
description: Adds a couple of early stage features like no log hitting
body:
[![ServerAtelier](https://www.serveratelier.com/assets/themes/atelier/assets/images/banner/sa_budget.png)](https://www.serveratelier.com/) ![Headline](https://i.imgur.com/Ek0QuQl.png)
[](https://discord.gg/cV4cJyGXqF) [](https://globox1997.github.io/wiki/mods/EarlyStage/) [](https://github.com/Globox1997/EarlyStage/issues)


EarlyStage adds a flint tool set for the start of the beginning. It adds the requirement to use an axe for logs. It also adds a sieve which can get customized item drops with a datapack. Stones laying around in the forest for more immersive gaming. How to get started: break leaves to get sticks, find gravel to get flint, gather rocks, craft a crafting rock, put sticks and flint on it and hit it a couple times with another rock! ![Showcase](https://i.imgur.com/aGuRNn7.png) The sieve can be used to sieve blocks like dirt or sand. Try it out and see what is hidden in the dirt. ![Showcase](https://i.imgur.com/ptNdQsD.png) ![Showcase](https://i.imgur.com/lMgFMCH.png)

[](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) [](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) This mod is developed for Fabric. There are no plans to develop a Forge version. Modpack Permission: Feel free to use it in any modpacks. Bug Report: Just report bugs at the github page.
